nasb.text: The sons of Merari were Mahli and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers’ households.

esv.text: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. These are the clans of the Levites according to their fathers.

cnv.text: 米拉利的兒子是抹利和母示。以上這些是利未人各宗族的各家。

ccb.text: 米拉利的儿子是抹利和姆示。以上是利未人按宗族分的各家族。
